cycles.hypothesis: Runtime provider provenance must be explicit, not inferred from docs.
cycles.tweak: Add provider_label on all web search clients and record provider_source in bridge runtime provenance.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: provider identity noted as hardcoded/ambiguous in cycle-25 audit context. After: provider labels asserted and run_context.search_provider_runtime.provider_source=client_label.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Improves scraped provider provenance traceability for primary artifacts.

cycles.tweak: Persist portal_skip_count, official_reader_error_count, fallback_materialization_count in source_quality_metrics.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: no explicit counters in package metrics. After: counters emitted and asserted.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Improves scrape selection observability and portal/fallback auditing.
cycles.next_tweak: Add policy lineage object with missing-family evidence.

cycles.hypothesis: Policy lineage completeness must be explicit in package context.
cycles.tweak: Emit policy_lineage with expected families, found flags, related artifacts, negative evidence, completeness score.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: no package-level lineage graph. After: run_context.policy_lineage present with lineage_presence + negative_evidence.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Shifts from single-document proof to lineage-aware scraped package quality.
cycles.next_tweak: Upgrade primary extraction facts with richer citation fields.

cycles.hypothesis: Primary-artifact parameter extraction needs raw+normalized citation metadata.
cycles.tweak: Enhance extraction to include raw_value, normalized_value, denominator, category, locator, confidence, sanity flags, ambiguity entries.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: minimal numeric facts. After: rich fact fields plus money-format anomaly evidence.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Improves human-auditable citation quality for scraped parameters.

cycles.hypothesis: Malformed parameters must become explicit ambiguous cards.
cycles.tweak: Builder now emits ParameterCard(state=ambiguous) when value/sanity fails; citation metadata appended in source_excerpt.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: malformed values could be silently dropped. After: malformed case emits ambiguity_reason=currency_format_anomaly.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Prevents silent bad-value promotion into economic handoff.
cycles.next_tweak: Add source reconciliation records between primary and secondary facts.

cycles.hypothesis: Overlapping source facts need explicit reconciliation outcomes.
cycles.tweak: Add source_reconciliation.records with per-field status and source-of-truth decision metadata.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: no reconciliation ledger in run context. After: reconciliation records persisted and asserted.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Improves cross-source conflict transparency and auditability.
cycles.next_tweak: Codify secondary override prevention as explicit policy signal.

cycles.hypothesis: Secondary search must not silently override primary artifacts.
cycles.tweak: Persist source_of_truth_policy and secondary_override_blocked guard in source_reconciliation.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: policy implicit. After: explicit precedence policy and override guard boolean.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Hardens source-of-truth governance when secondary rescue is present.
cycles.next_tweak: Improve fallback robustness via source-shape drift detection.

cycles.hypothesis: Source-shape drift should be detected as a robustness signal.
cycles.tweak: Add source-shape drift detector and persist drift summary under source_quality_metrics; add fail-closed reason on drift.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: no drift signal. After: drift_detected + missing counts emitted and tested.

cycles.hypothesis: Scraped-lane D-gate checks need a reusable regression verifier.
cycles.tweak: Add verify_scraped_lane_data_moat.py and verification tests for D1/D2/D4/D5/D8 field presence.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: no dedicated scraped-lane verifier. After: verifier script returns pass/fail with gate breakdown.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Prevents future regressions from dropping key scraped-lane moat fields.
cycles.next_tweak: Publish complete cycle ledger with measured deltas.

cycles.hypothesis: Cycle output must be handoff-ready and complete for A1-A10.
cycles.tweak: Publish Agent A cycle artifacts (.md + .json) with measured deltas and validation command log.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before: no completed Agent A ten-cycle ledger. After: A1-A10 documented; targeted suite reports 54 passed.
cycles.impact_on_quality: Provides explicit scraped-lane progress evidence for decision-grade moat review.
cycles.next_tweak: Run live dev probe to verify new fields on current persisted package row.
